message.content:
@startuml skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center autonumber "[0]" actor "ユーザ" as User1 participant "ブラウザ\n(HTML/CSS/JS)" as Browser1 control web_php_1 as "web.php" controller PersonController_1 as "PersonController" entity person_model_1 as "Person Model" User1 ->> Browser1 : 該当ページをリクエスト[person/find] Browser1 ->> web_php_1 : GET [person/find]\nルーティング処理開始 activate web_php_1 note right of web_php_1: Route::get('person/find',\n'App\Http\Controllers\\
PersonController@index'); alt ルート定義ありの場合 activate PersonController_1 opt ミドルウェア実行 loop すべてのミドルウェアを実行 create participant middleware_stack as "<> \nmiddleware stack" #LightBlue rect rgb(245, 238, 209) MiddlewareStack --> WebPHP1 : $request を受け取り、$response を返す @enduml
